name: Rake
description: A zen garden mid-morning — raked sand lines flowing around the stones, re-combed by every redraw.

code.style: --rule: ( /* the two raked lines share one emitted tone; stone and halo share one center */ --sand: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2)); --rxx: @r(26, 50); --ryy: @r(24, 48); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: -2%; width: 104%; top: @rand(10%, 24%); height: calc(16px / @Y); border-radius: 99px; background: @var(--sand); box-shadow: 0 calc(190px / @Y) @var(--sand), 0 calc(380px / @Y) @var(--sand); opacity: @rand(0.7, 1); transition: ease 700ms; } } @random(0.16) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: calc(@var(--rxx) * 1%); top: calc(@var(--ryy) * 1%); @size: @rand(22%, 36%); border-radius: @rand(38%, 52%) @rand(38%, 52%) @rand(38%, 52%) @rand(38%, 52%); background: var(--color2); box-shadow: 0 0 0 calc(110px / @Y) var(--color0), 0 0 0 calc(140px / @Y) var(--color3); transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
